section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

tr.td: Results per page unless overridden by the request.
Default sort expression.
Alternate catalog name for non-product search.
Band name used by sibling view components.
Enable inline autosuggest.
Search term. * performs all-products browse.
1-indexed page number.
Request override for results per page.
Request override for sort order.
Repeatable facet filters.
Suggest-only mode for autosuggest AJAX calls.

section.name: DiscoveryCategoryComponent

tr.td: Component-level default page size.
Component-level default sort.
Data band label for sibling components.
Discovery category ID. Required when no document supplies it.
1-indexed page number.
Sort expression.
Repeatable facet filters.

section.p: Category ID can come from the request, a configured document, or other page context depending on how the page is wired.

section.name: Named data bands
section.p: Multiple Discovery result sets can coexist on one page. Use a unique label on each data-fetching component, then point sibling view components at that band with connectTo. This keeps "featured", "main", and category-specific datasets isolated.

tr.td: Reads product results and pagination from a matching band.
Reads facet groups from a matching search or category band.
searchResult / categoryResult
Full Discovery response including products, facets, paging, and campaigns.
Product list exposed by the grid view component.
Facet map exposed by the facet view component.
Pagination model for current page, total rows, and total pages.

section.name: Page Model API
section.p: Headless delivery receives the same data that drives the FTL templates.

section.name: Category/Product Highlights
section.p: Use DiscoveryCategoryHighlightComponent for curated category tiles and DiscoveryProductHighlightComponent for hand-picked products. Both are editor-driven showcase components intended for fixed placements such as homepages and landing pages.
